ItacPersonItem.Notes: Portrait from Meninni, Le Meraviglie Poetiche, 1705. Before becoming member of the Spensierati Academy in Rossano Calabro, also called Incuriositi, Meninni used to be against the new scientific experimental method, which was promoted by the Investiganti Academy in Naples, and which the Spensierati aimed to revive. See Maurizio Torrini, `L`accademia degli Investiganti`, in Quaderni Storici 16 (1981), and Meninni`s biography by Carlo Alberto Girotto, in DBI.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
